title: Spire Codex - Ultimate Companion & Stats Aggregator
description:
[h1]Spire Codex - Ultimate Companion & Stats Aggregator[/h1]
Spire Codex brings the power of spire-codex.com directly into Slay the Spire 2. No more alt-tabbing to check stats mid-run.

Whether you're new to the climb or grinding Ascension 10, Spire Codex gives you data-driven insight (Codex Elo + Codex Score) at a glance to help you make winning decisions. When your run ends it's automatically saved to https://spire-codex.com.

[h2]Features[/h2]
- Automatic run tracking: Every run uploads and competes on the leaderboards, and gets its own shareable page on the website.
- In-game community tooltips: Win rates and Codex tiers shown natively on the game's own tooltips for cards, relics, potions, events, and campfire options.
- Stat brackets: Filter the community numbers by bracket (All runs, Ascension 10, or higher win-rate players) so you can follow what competitive players actually pick.
- Live damage meter: Track your damage per turn, total, biggest hit, and damage taken in combat. Drag it anywhere on screen.
- Personal insights: Your own pick rates and run history shown alongside the community stats.
- Map route & danger: A recommended route plus per-node danger ratings from community data (Codex Risk).
- In-overlay settings: Toggle every on-screen surface and pick your stat bracket right from the F5 panel.

[h2]Controls[/h2]
- Open/close the overlay: F5 (or click either stick, R3/L3, on a controller)
- Switch tabs: Tab (or L1/R1 / LB/RB on a controller)

[h2]References[/h2]
Find out more about Spire Codex through our GitHub, Overwolf, and the main website.

[h2]Requirements[/h2]
Requires BaseLib
changeNote: Added a draggable live damage meter, stat brackets (follow Ascension 10 / high win-rate players), an in-overlay Settings tab, and controller open/close; fixed rest-site HP display.
